message:
chore(deps): add asupersync v0.2.0 version pin to workspace Cargo.toml

The workspace-level asupersync dependency previously used only a local
path reference with test-internals feature. This adds version = "0.2.0"
to align with the published crates.io release, ensuring cargo can resolve
the dependency from the registry when the local path is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
